ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the session belongs to */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the session */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session the trial belongs to */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Number of the trial within the session */,
  "beg_frame" INTEGER /* Frame number where the trial begins */,
  "end_frame" INTEGER /* Frame number where the trial ends */,
  "recording_file" TEXT /* Path to the recording file associated with the trial */,
  "trial_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frames" (
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frame */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial the frame belongs to */,
  "frame_number" INTEGER /* Frame number within the trial */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the frame */,
  "annotations" TEXT /* Annotations or notes for the frame */,
  "frame_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the frame */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frames_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recordings" (
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recording file */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial the recording belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the recording file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the recording file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the recording file */,
  "file_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the recording file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recordings_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the trial */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the trial was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial the metadata belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  "metadata_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the publication belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the funding belongs to */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Agency providing the funding */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the funding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
